_note: The geas instruction set — Deepgilt's botting layer as content. A servant runs its geas (ordered instructions) every tick. Mobile uses fixed presets; PC exposes the full editor (the sanctioned scripting / Screeps pillar). geas_length (instruction + conditional budget) scales with Wyrd + Bonecraft skills.

instructions.desc: Path toward a target or point.
Stay within range of a target (default the binder).
Acquire and pursue a target matching filter.
Strike target with a basic or assigned skill.
Use a skill when condition holds (e.g., off cooldown, target hp<50%).
Walk over and collect gilt/items in range (gilt only on mobile).
Hold a position; engage anything entering radius.
Disengage and fall back when own hp < threshold.
Idle until a condition or duration passes.
PC-only: take the rift to the next depth when the floor is cleared (self-farming).

control_flow._note: PC editor only; mobile presets are flat sequences.

REPEAT.desc: Loop the body each tick (default wrapper).

platform_rules.mobile: Preset geas only. No custom editor, no DESCEND, items not auto-grabbed. Behaves like a merc/minion AI — keeps mobile free of custom automation by design.
platform_rules.pc: Full editor: compose instructions + IF/REPEAT, save as shareable/sellable 'geas-scrolls'. This is the sanctioned botting layer.

example_pc_farm_geas._desc: A Bonewright PC farm script: clear floors, loot gilt, heal-retreat, descend — the legal botnet, on theme.
